description: lookup_user_perm guards the index with an early-return bounds check; lookup_color_palette and lookup_audio_channel access the vector unconditionally.

findings.rationale: lookup_user_perm has an early-return bounds check that the other two lookups omit. The check is load-bearing on the auth path: the index is derived from user input via a non-collision-free hash, so out-of-bounds is reachable. Unifying onto a shared lookup() that drops the check re-introduces a heap out-of-bounds read.
